'''chazuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibiscus|hibiscus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibiscus|hibiscus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzikith|chæzikith]] || [[word:chæzikij|chæzikij]] || [[word:chæzikish|chæzikish]] || [[word:chæziki|chæziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazuzukuth|chazuzukuth]] || [[word:chazuzukuj|chazuzukuj]] || [[word:chazuzukush|chazuzukush]] || [[word:chazuzuku|chazuzuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazukuth|chazukuth]] || [[word:chazukuj|chazukuj]] || [[word:chazukush|chazukush]] || [[word:chazuku|chazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazufkuth|chazufkuth]] || [[word:chazufkuj|chazufkuj]] || [[word:chazufkush|chazufkush]] || [[word:chazufkuf|chazufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazukuthu|chazukuthu]] || [[word:chazukuju|chazukuju]] || [[word:chazukushu|chazukushu]] || [[word:chazukuku|chazukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazukuth|chazukuth]] || [[word:chazukuj|chazukuj]] || [[word:chazukush|chazukush]] || [[word:chazuku|chazuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazukuthul|chazukuthul]] || [[word:chazukujul|chazukujul]] || [[word:chazukushul|chazukushul]] || [[word:chazukukul|chazukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazukuthuthu|chazukuthuthu]] || [[word:chazukujuju|chazukujuju]] || [[word:chazukushushu|chazukushushu]] || [[word:chazukuku|chazukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazukuthun|chazukuthun]] || [[word:chazukujun|chazukujun]] || [[word:chazukushun|chazukushun]] || [[word:chazukukun|chazukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazukuthuoro|chazukuthuoro]] || [[word:chazukujuoro|chazukujuoro]] || [[word:chazukushuoro|chazukushuoro]] || [[word:chazukukuoro|chazukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
